languages.text: "Мне нравится идея мобильных отрядов. Свезите псайкеров со всего протектората для приманок".

traits.locale_text: "Мне нравится идея мобильных отрядов. Свезите псайкеров со всего протектората для приманок".

languages.text: "I like the idea of mobile teams. Gather psykers from across the protectorate to serve as bait."
languages.original_text: "Мне нравится идея мобильных отрядов. Свезите псайкеров со всего протектората для приманок".

traits.locale_text: "I like the notion of mobile teams. Gather psykers from across the protectorate to serve as bait."
"I like the idea of mobile teams. Gather psykers from across the protectorate to serve as bait."
"I like the idea of mobile units."
"I like the notion of mobile teams. Gather psykers from across the protectorate to serve as bait."
"I like the idea of mobile teams. Gather psykers from across the protectorate to serve as bait."

languages.text: 「移動型ユニットのアイデアは気に入っている」
languages.original_text: "I like the idea of mobile units."

traits.locale_text: 「移動型ユニットのアイデアは気に入っています」

languages.text: «Me gusta la idea de las unidades móviles. Reúna psíquicos del protectorado para que actúen como cebo».
languages.original_text: "I like the idea of mobile teams. Gather psykers from across the protectorate to serve as bait."

traits.locale_text: «Me gusta la idea de las unidades móviles. Reúna psíquicos del protectorado para que actúen como cebo».

languages.text: “机动部队的方案不错。在整个属地调集灵能者，让他们充当诱饵。”
languages.original_text: "I like the idea of mobile teams. Gather psykers from across the protectorate to serve as bait."

traits.locale_text: “机动部队的方案不错。在整个属地调集灵能者，让他们充当诱饵。”

languages.text: "Mir gefällt die Idee mit den mobilen Teams. Versammelt Psioniker aus allen Teilen des Protektorats und benutzt sie als Köder."
languages.original_text: "I like the idea of mobile teams. Gather psykers from across the protectorate to serve as bait."

traits.locale_text: "Mir gefällt die Idee mit den mobilen Teams. Versammelt Psioniker aus allen Teilen des Protektorats und benutzt sie als Köder."

languages.text: "Mobil ekip fikri hoşuma gitti. Yem olarak kullanılmak üzere protektoranın dört bir yanından ruhsezer toplayın."
languages.original_text: "I like the idea of mobile teams. Gather psykers from across the protectorate to serve as bait."

traits.locale_text: "Mobil ekip fikri hoşuma gitti. Yem olarak kullanılmak üzere protektoranın dört bir yanından ruhsezer toplayın."

languages.text: « L'idée d'escouades mobiles me plaît. Rassemblez des psykers des quatre coins du protectorat afin qu'ils servent d'appât. »
languages.original_text: "I like the idea of mobile teams. Gather psykers from across the protectorate to serve as bait."

traits.locale_text: « L'idée d'escouades mobiles me plaît. Rassemblez des psykers des quatre coins du protectorat afin qu'ils servent d'appât. »
